introSection: Kiddie Coaster, also referred to as Little Roller Coaster, was a kiddie roller coaster previously located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was replaced with Puff The Little Fire Dragon.

fullText:
Kiddie Coaster, also referred to as Little Roller Coaster, was a kiddie roller coaster previously located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA.

The ride was replaced with Puff The Little Fire Dragon.
